His Excellency the #Chief_of_the_General_of_Staff of the Army, Lieutenant General Khaled Daraj Saad Al-Sharayan, and His Excellency the #Deputy_Chief_of_the_General_of_Staff of the Army, Major General Pilot Sabah Jaber Al-Ahmad Al-Sabah, visited a number of injured members of the Kuwaiti Ground Force, who were injured as a result of targeting a number of Kuwaiti army installations and camps with drones. Hostility, this morning, following the sinful Iranian aggression, in order to check on their health condition and follow up on the progress of the medical care provided to them. During the visit, His Excellency listened to an explanation from the medical team about the health condition of the injured, praising the efforts made by the medical staff in providing the necessary care and treatment, and wishing the injured a speedy recovery and good health. #Kuwaiti_Army

RT by @NotWoofers: The IRGC has overnight and this morning launched a series of attacks against the Autonomous Region of Kurdistan. The first wave of attacks was aimed at Hawler (Erbil) - several drones were launched to strike sites of the US military within the KRG; the drones were intercepted. Then this morning, the IRGC launched an attack on a camp of the Komala south of Slemani city. 8 Peshmerga of the Komala have been martyred, 13 others are wounded and at least 1 Peshmerga has succumbed to his wounds. This marks a major escalation in the attacks by the IRGC against Kurdish forces from Rojhelat. The IRGC has again implemented its strategy of units that operate autonomously - pre designated sites are being struck at will, without orders from the IRGC command structure. These units use drones from hidden storage sites.
